target.command: rtk cargo run -p mustard-rt --quiet -- run spec-clear --help 2>&1 | tail -40

payload.stdout_excerpt:
[rtk] /!\ No hook installed — run `rtk init -g` for automatic token savings
Sweep terminal, idle spec directories under `.claude/spec/` (W5.T5.5).

Default is **dry-run**: enumerates every spec whose `meta.json` reports `stage=close` + `outcome=completed` and whose most-recent NDJSON event is older than `--age-days N` (default 15). Pass `--apply` to `fs::remove_dir_all` each candidate. Emits a JSON report and a `spec.clear.run` harness event.

Usage: mustard-rt.exe run spec-clear [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --repo <REPO>
          Repo root override. Defaults to the current working directory

      --age-days <AGE_DAYS>
          Age threshold in whole days. Specs whose newest event is older than this become candidates
          
          [default: 15]

      --dry-run
          Preview only — emit the report, mutate nothing (the default)

      --apply
          Apply the removals. Required to mutate the filesystem

      --all
          Sweep every terminal spec regardless of age

      --name <NAME>
          Restrict the sweep to one spec slug

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
